열왕기상 1:1.content: Now king David was old and advanced in years; and they covered him with clothes, but he couldn’t keep warm.

열왕기상 1:2.content: Therefore his servants said to him, “Let a young virgin be sought for my lord the king. Let her stand before the king, and cherish him; and let her lie in your bosom, that my lord the king may keep warm.”

열왕기상 1:3.content: So they sought for a beautiful young lady throughout all the borders of Israel, and found Abishag the Shunammite, and brought her to the king.

열왕기상 1:4.content: The young lady was very beautiful; and she cherished the king, and served him; but the king didn’t know her intimately.

열왕기상 1:5.content: Then Adonijah the son of Haggith exalted himself, saying, “I will be king.” Then he prepared him chariots and horsemen, and fifty men to run before him.

열왕기상 1:6.content: His father had not displeased him at any time in saying, “Why have you done so?” and he was also a very handsome man; and he was born after Absalom.

열왕기상 1:7.content: He conferred with Joab the son of Zeruiah, and with Abiathar the priest; and they followed Adonijah and helped him.

열왕기상 1:8.content: But Zadok the priest, Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, Nathan the prophet, Shimei, Rei, and the mighty men who belonged to David, were not with Adonijah.

열왕기상 1:9.content: Adonijah killed sheep, cattle, and fatlings by the stone of Zoheleth, which is beside En Rogel; and he called all his brothers, the king’s sons, and all the men of Judah, the king’s servants;

열왕기상 1:10.content: but he didn’t call Nathan the prophet, and Benaiah, and the mighty men, and Solomon his brother.

열왕기상 1:11.content: Then Nathan spoke to Bathsheba the mother of Solomon, saying, “Haven’t you heard that Adonijah the son of Haggith reigns, and David our lord doesn’t know it?

열왕기상 1:12.content: Now therefore come, please let me give you counsel, that you may save your own life, and your son Solomon’s life.

열왕기상 1:13.content: Go in to king David, and tell him, ‘Didn’t you, my lord, king, swear to your servant, saying, “Assuredly Solomon your son shall reign after me, and he shall sit on my throne?” Why then does Adonijah reign?’

열왕기상 1:14.content: Behold, while you are still talking there with the king, I will also come in after you and confirm your words.”

열왕기상 1:15.content: Bathsheba went in to the king in his room. The king was very old; and Abishag the Shunammite was serving the king.

열왕기상 1:16.content: Bathsheba bowed, and showed respect to the king. The king said, “What would you like?”

열왕기상 1:17.content: She said to him, “My lord, you swore by Yahweh your God to your servant, ‘Assuredly Solomon your son shall reign after me, and he shall sit on my throne.’

열왕기상 1:18.content: Now, behold, Adonijah reigns; and you, my lord the king, don’t know it.

열왕기상 1:19.content: He has slain cattle and fatlings and sheep in abundance, and has called all the sons of the king, Abiathar the priest, and Joab the captain of the army; but he hasn’t called Solomon your servant.

열왕기상 1:20.content: You, my lord the king, the eyes of all Israel are on you, that you should tell them who will sit on the throne of my lord the king after him.

열왕기상 1:21.content: Otherwise it will happen, when my lord the king sleeps with his fathers, that I and my son Solomon will be considered criminals.”

열왕기상 1:22.content: Behold, while she was still talking with the king, Nathan the prophet came in.

열왕기상 1:23.content: They told the king, saying, “Behold, Nathan the prophet!” When he had come in before the king, he bowed himself before the king with his face to the ground.

열왕기상 1:24.content: Nathan said, “My lord, king, have you said, ‘Adonijah shall reign after me, and he shall sit on my throne?’

열왕기상 1:25.content: For he has gone down today, and has slain cattle, fatlings, and sheep in abundance, and has called all the king’s sons, the captains of the army, and Abiathar the priest. Behold, they are eating and drinking before him, and saying, ‘Long live king Adonijah!’

열왕기상 1:26.content: But he hasn’t called me, even me your servant, Zadok the priest, Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and your servant Solomon.

열왕기상 1:27.content: Was this thing done by my lord the king, and you haven’t shown to your servants who should sit on the throne of my lord the king after him?”

열왕기상 1:28.content: Then king David answered, “Call Bathsheba in to me.” She came into the king’s presence and stood before the king.

열왕기상 1:29.content: The king swore, and said, “As Yahweh lives, who has redeemed my soul out of all adversity,

열왕기상 1:30.content: most certainly as I swore to you by Yahweh, the God of Israel, saying, ‘Assuredly Solomon your son shall reign after me, and he shall sit on my throne in my place;’ I will most certainly do this today.”

열왕기상 1:31.content: Then Bathsheba bowed with her face to the earth, and showed respect to the king, and said, “Let my lord king David live forever!”

열왕기상 1:32.content: King David said, “Call to me Zadok the priest, Nathan the prophet, and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada.” They came before the king.

열왕기상 1:33.content: The king said to them, “Take with you the servants of your lord, and cause Solomon my son to ride on my own mule, and bring him down to Gihon.

열왕기상 1:34.content: Let Zadok the priest and Nathan the prophet anoint him there king over Israel. Blow the trumpet, and say, ‘Long live king Solomon!’

열왕기상 1:35.content: Then come up after him, and he shall come and sit on my throne; for he shall be king in my place. I have appointed him to be prince over Israel and over Judah.”

열왕기상 1:36.content: Benaiah the son of Jehoiada answered the king, and said, “Amen. May Yahweh, the God of my lord the king, say so.

열왕기상 1:37.content: As Yahweh has been with my lord the king, even so may he be with Solomon, and make his throne greater than the throne of my lord king David.”

열왕기상 1:38.content: So Zadok the priest, Nathan the prophet, Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and the Cherethites and the Pelethites went down and had Solomon ride on king David’s mule, and brought him to Gihon.

열왕기상 1:39.content: Zadok the priest took the horn of oil from the Tent, and anointed Solomon. They blew the trumpet; and all the people said, “Long live king Solomon!”

열왕기상 1:40.content: All the people came up after him, and the people piped with pipes, and rejoiced with great joy, so that the earth shook with their sound.

열왕기상 1:41.content: Adonijah and all the guests who were with him heard it as they had finished eating. When Joab heard the sound of the trumpet, he said, “Why is this noise of the city being in an uproar?”

열왕기상 1:42.content: While he yet spoke, behold, Jonathan the son of Abiathar the priest came; and Adonijah said, “Come in; for you are a worthy man, and bring good news.”

열왕기상 1:43.content: Jonathan answered Adonijah, “Most certainly our lord king David has made Solomon king.

열왕기상 1:44.content: The king has sent with him Zadok the priest, Nathan the prophet, Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and the Cherethites and the Pelethites; and they have caused him to ride on the king’s mule.

열왕기상 1:45.content: Zadok the priest and Nathan the prophet have anointed him king in Gihon. They have come up from there rejoicing, so that the city rang again. This is the noise that you have heard.

열왕기상 1:46.content: Also, Solomon sits on the throne of the kingdom.

열왕기상 1:47.content: Moreover the king’s servants came to bless our lord king David, saying, ‘May your God make the name of Solomon better than your name, and make his throne greater than your throne;’ and the king bowed himself on the bed.

열왕기상 1:48.content: Also thus said the king, ‘Blessed be Yahweh, the God of Israel, who has given one to sit on my throne today, my eyes even seeing it.’ ”

열왕기상 1:49.content: All the guests of Adonijah were afraid, and rose up, and each man went his way.

열왕기상 1:50.content: Adonijah was afraid because of Solomon; and he arose, and went, and hung onto the horns of the altar.

열왕기상 1:51.content: Solomon was told, “Behold, Adonijah fears king Solomon; for, behold, he is hanging onto the horns of the altar, saying, ‘Let king Solomon swear to me first that he will not kill his servant with the sword.’ ”

열왕기상 1:52.content: Solomon said, “If he shows himself a worthy man, not a hair of his shall fall to the earth; but if wickedness is found in him, he shall die.”

열왕기상 1:53.content: So king Solomon sent, and they brought him down from the altar. He came and bowed down to king Solomon; and Solomon said to him, “Go to your house.”
